summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Canopi landing page visual updates - all 7 required features working perfectly, mobile responsiveness issue from iteration 1 successfully resolved
passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint (/api/) returns correct response
POST /api/waitlist accepts email and returns success
GET /api/waitlist returns waitlist entries
POST /api/status creates status checks
GET /api/status returns status entries
Hero section renders with forest aerial background image from Unsplash
Hero section displays light text (rgb(216, 195, 165)) on dark forest background
Navbar shows light text initially on hero section
Navbar transitions to dark text (rgb(39, 78, 59)) when scrolled with --scrolled class
Join the Waitlist CTA clickable and scrolls correctly to waitlist section
Learn More CTA clickable and scrolls correctly to problem section
All 9 sections render properly (Hero, Problem, Solution, How It Works, Who It's For, Why Now, Founder, Waitlist, Footer)
Waitlist email form submits successfully to POST /api/waitlist backend
Waitlist success message displays correctly after submission
Mobile hamburger menu visible and functional at 375px width (FIXED from iteration 1)
Mobile hamburger menu opens/closes correctly with all 5 navigation links visible
Desktop navbar links properly hidden on mobile screens
Mobile sections and CTAs render correctly and remain functional
Smooth scroll navigation works perfectly from all navbar links (5/5 successful)
Forest background properly configured with cover size and center position
Hero section maintains proper full viewport height (100vh)
Mobile responsive layout works correctly across all key sections
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (5/5 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (22/22 tests passed)
